_disclaimer: Allergen and dietary info may be outdated. Always verify with a Cast Member before ordering.
_maintainer: Trip planner — update before each visit and submit a PR
_park_codes: MK=Magic Kingdom  EP=EPCOT  HS=Hollywood Studios  AK=Animal Kingdom  DS=Disney Springs  RES=Resort Hotel

restaurants.name: Be Our Guest Restaurant
restaurants.description: Dine inside the Beast's enchanted castle. Prix-fixe dinner; quick-service lunch.

restaurants.name: Cinderella's Royal Table
restaurants.description: Character dining inside Cinderella Castle. Meet Disney Princesses at breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

restaurants.name: The Crystal Palace
restaurants.description: Buffet with Winnie the Pooh characters. Good for families with varied tastes.

restaurants.name: Liberty Tree Tavern
restaurants.description: Colonial American family-style dinner: turkey, stuffing, pot roast. Festive and filling.

restaurants.name: Jungle Navigation Co. Ltd Skipper Canteen
restaurants.description: Quirky Jungle Cruise-themed restaurant. Adventurous menu with puns; rarely needs advance booking.

restaurants.name: Cosmic Ray's Starlight Cafe
restaurants.description: Largest quick-service in Magic Kingdom. Burgers, chicken, sandwiches. Audio-Animatronic lounge singer.

restaurants.name: Pecos Bill Tall Tale Inn and Cafe
restaurants.description: Tex-Mex quick service in Frontierland. Nachos, burgers, salads.

restaurants.name: Pinocchio Village Haus
restaurants.description: Pizza and pasta overlooking It's a Small World. Fun views for kids.

restaurants.name: Le Cellier Steakhouse
restaurants.description: EPCOT's most sought-after reservation. Prime Canadian beef, cheddar cheese soup, cosy cellar atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Via Napoli Ristorante e Pizzeria
restaurants.description: Authentic Neapolitan pizza in Italy Pavilion. Wood-fired ovens named after Italian volcanoes.

restaurants.name: Teppan Edo
restaurants.description: Hibachi-style teppanyaki dining in Japan Pavilion. Chef cooks tableside — interactive and fun for kids.

restaurants.name: Coral Reef Restaurant
restaurants.description: Dine beside the Living Seas aquarium tank. Seafood-focused menu; magical underwater views.

restaurants.name: Garden Grill Restaurant
restaurants.description: Rotating family-style restaurant above Soarin'. Character dining with Mickey and friends.

restaurants.name: Biergarten Restaurant
restaurants.description: Lively Oktoberfest atmosphere in Germany Pavilion. Oompah band, buffet of sausages, pretzels, schnitzel.

restaurants.name: Space 220 Restaurant
restaurants.description: Immersive space-themed restaurant; simulated elevator to a space station with stunning Earth views.

restaurants.name: La Hacienda de San Angel
restaurants.description: Waterfront Mexican dining in Mexico Pavilion with views of World Showcase Lagoon.

restaurants.name: Sunshine Seasons
restaurants.description: EPCOT's best quick service. Multiple stations: wood-fired grill, Asian noodles, sandwiches, salads.

restaurants.name: Regal Eagle Smokehouse
restaurants.description: American Pavilion BBQ quick service. Smoked meats, mac and cheese, all-American sides.

restaurants.name: 50's Prime Time Café
restaurants.description: Retro 1950s kitchen setting. Servers play stern 'mum' role — eat your vegetables! Comfort food classics.

restaurants.name: Sci-Fi Dine-In Theater Restaurant
restaurants.description: Eat in drive-in movie cars while watching classic sci-fi clips. Burgers, shakes, and atmosphere.

restaurants.name: The Hollywood Brown Derby
restaurants.description: Upscale Hollywood-era dining. Famous Cobb salad, fine meats. Most upscale option in Hollywood Studios.

restaurants.name: Docking Bay 7 Food and Cargo
restaurants.description: Galaxy's Edge quick service inside a spaceship hangar. Smoked Kaadu ribs, meiloorun fruit salad.

restaurants.name: Ronto Roasters
restaurants.description: Galaxy's Edge wrap stand. Spit-roasted meats turned by a pod-racing engine. Ronto Morning Wrap is a fan favourite.

restaurants.name: Woody's Lunch Box
restaurants.description: Toy Story Land quick service inside a giant lunchbox. Totchos, grilled cheese, lunch box tarts.

restaurants.name: Tiffins Restaurant
restaurants.description: Animal Kingdom's signature restaurant. Dishes inspired by worldwide expeditions; stunning Imagineering art.

restaurants.name: Yak & Yeti Restaurant
restaurants.description: Pan-Asian cuisine in Asia area. Dim sum, noodles, fried rice, crispy duck. Relaxed atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Tusker House Restaurant
restaurants.description: Donald Duck character buffet in Harambe. African-inspired dishes alongside familiar favourites.

restaurants.name: Satu'li Canteen
restaurants.description: Pandora's quick service. Build-your-own bowls with bold flavours; one of the best quick-service meals at WDW.

restaurants.name: Flame Tree Barbecue
restaurants.description: Outdoor BBQ with beautiful waterfront seating near Expedition Everest. Smoked ribs, chicken, pulled pork.

restaurants.name: Harambe Market
restaurants.description: Outdoor African market stalls. Grilled chicken skewers, ribs, plantains. Festive open-air setting.

restaurants.name: The BOATHOUSE
restaurants.description: Disney Springs flagship. Prime seafood, steaks, and craft cocktails on the water with amphicar tours.

restaurants.name: Morimoto Asia
restaurants.description: Iron Chef Morimoto's Disney Springs restaurant. Pan-Asian small plates, sushi, and whole roasted duck.

restaurants.name: Homecomin' Florida Kitchen
restaurants.description: Florida-sourced Southern comfort food. Fried chicken, Church Lady deviled eggs, craft moonshine cocktails.

restaurants.name: T-REX Cafe
restaurants.description: Animated dinosaurs, meteor showers, and a giant octopus. Kids love it. Burgers, pasta, shareable plates.

restaurants.name: Rainforest Cafe (Disney Springs)
restaurants.description: Thunderstorms, animatronic animals, and a waterfall. Classic family dining experience.

restaurants.name: Wolfgang Puck Bar & Grill
restaurants.description: Celebrity chef's Disney Springs outpost. Signature flatbreads, seasonal California cuisine.

restaurants.name: California Grill
restaurants.description: Rooftop restaurant atop the Contemporary Resort. Stunning Magic Kingdom fireworks views. Sushi, flatbreads, seasonal menus.

restaurants.name: 'Ohana
restaurants.description: Family-style Polynesian feasting at the Polynesian Resort. Stitch character breakfast; skewered meats dinner.

restaurants.name: Sanaa
restaurants.description: African-Indian cuisine at Kidani Village with savanna animal views. Iconic bread service with nine accompaniments.

restaurants.name: Boma — Flavors of Africa
restaurants.description: African buffet at Animal Kingdom Lodge. 50+ dishes including bobotie, peri-peri chicken, and African soups.

restaurants.name: Narcoossee's
restaurants.description: Upscale lakeside seafood at the Grand Floridian with views of Magic Kingdom fireworks.

restaurants.name: Flying Fish
restaurants.description: Signature seafood at BoardWalk Resort. Potato-wrapped snapper is the legendary dish.

restaurants.name: Storybook Dining at Artist Point
restaurants.description: Snow White character dining at Wilderness Lodge. Fairy-tale atmosphere; Evil Queen, Dopey, Grumpy, and Forestmaster Merlin.
